case_title: JAMILEN MOHAMED ABUNIE VS. WILTON MARSHALL

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING REQUEST OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PURS. TO DEBTOR DECLARATION (SCF 45)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO PLAINTIFF ABUNIE, JAMILEN MOHAMED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABUNIE, JAMILEN MOHAMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARSHALL, WILTON $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,500.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE PROVISIONS OF CIVIL CODE 1950.5. HIS RETENTION OF THE DEPOSIT WAS IN BAD FAITH DUE TO SUCH FAILURE AND THE COURT AWARDS THE VALUE OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT ($2500) PLUS $1,000 IN A PENALTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BRAD KAPLAN. FILED BY ABUNIE, JAMILEN MOHAMED MARSHALL, WILTON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ABUNIE, JAMILEN MOHAMED AS TO DEFENDANT MARSHALL, WILTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY ARABIC INTERPRETER---RIMA ABUNIE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABUNIE, JAMILEN MOHAMED ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-15-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARSHALL, WILTON
